message:
fix(fr-store): replace unwrap/unreachable panics with proper error returns in store operations

Eliminate five panic-prone code paths in the store layer:

- getdel: use let-else to return Ok(None) when key vanishes between
  expiry check and removal (race-safe), and return StoreError::WrongType
  instead of unreachable!() on type mismatch
- zadd/zincrby sorted-set upsert: replace verbose insert-then-get_mut
  double-lookup pattern with idiomatic entry().or_insert_with(), and
  swap unreachable!() for Err(StoreError::WrongType)
- zpopmin/zpopmax: replace .unwrap() on min_by/max_by result with
  let-else returning Ok(None) for empty sorted sets

Add test coverage for the new error paths: getdel_wrongtype test and
expanded WrongType assertions for zincrby, zpopmin, zpopmax.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
